differential_diagnoses: Dengue hemorrhagic fever with pulmonary complications
next_steps: Send blood/serum for Hantavirus-specific RT-PCR and serology (IgM/IgG)
Obtain bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) to evaluate for hemorrhage, fungal elements, and conduct multiplex respiratory pathogen PCR
Measure serum albumin and evaluate fluid balance strictly to differentiate capillary leak from cardiogenic fluid overload
Order a Leptospirosis PCR or microscopic agglutination test (MAT)
Request an urgent autoimmune serology panel including ANCA, ANA, and anti-GBM
Initiate or continue conservative fluid management with hemodynamic monitoring
